global_description: A small, plump songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features vibrant olive-green upperparts and bright yellow underparts. The face is marked with a distinctive black mask and sideburns, contrasting with the yellow throat and eye ring.

part_details.upperparts: Vibrant olive-green, smooth feathers covering the back and wings.
part_details.underparts: Bright yellow, soft plumage on the belly and chest.
part_details.face: Black mask extending from the beak through the eyes, with black sideburns.
part_details.eye_ring: Thin, bright yellow ring encircling the eyes.
part_details.tail: Short, rounded, olive-green with subtle feathering.

spatial_relations: The black mask extends from the beak across the eyes.
The yellow eye ring encircles the eyes within the black mask.
The olive-green upperparts cover the back and wings.
The bright yellow underparts span from the throat to the belly.
